rhythm_trace.name: entrained_cycle_INVALID_FLOAT_STATE
rhythm_trace.description: DELIBERATE VIOLATION: coherence_ratio (float 0.89) injected as the QA state variable b. This is exactly the T2-b firewall breach the cert exists to catch — a continuous HRV-coherence measurement being cast as a causal input to QA dynamics rather than an observer projection output.

source_attribution: Oschman 2015 + HeartMath Institute; FAIL fixture authored by Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-20.

witnesses.note: Coherence-ratio is the measured output of orbit-class dynamics per the Rein/McCraty result; casting it as input is the firewall breach.
Master-oscillator broadcasting is the discrete generator; continuous output readings do not re-enter as state.

fail_ledger.reason: QA state variable b was assigned a non-integer float value (0.89). Per Theorem NT, continuous coherence-ratio measurements are observer projections (output direction only), never causal QA state.
Top-level rhythm-state field 'coherence_ratio' matches a known continuous-measurement alias; such measurements live in observer_projections[...].reading with direction=output.
